caption: Inside a vehicle, a person's hand reaches toward a center console featuring a wooden finish. The console houses a digital screen and a gear shift lever with a polished wooden knob and a leather-wrapped shaft. A hand enters the frame from the left, with the index finger extending toward a small circular dial or button located to the left of the digital screen. Across the sequence, the finger moves closer to the button, eventually making contact with it. The hand's position shifts slightly as it presses the button, while the gear shift remains stationary in the foreground. The surrounding interior includes dark plastic trim and a brown fabric surface on the far left. There is no visible text or logos on the equipment.
